critical_gaps: Lack of experience with FastAPI and Django
No visible experience with Docker or containerization
strengths: Multiple projects showcasing AI and automation skills
Use of relevant technologies like Groq and n8n
Presence of READMEs in most repositories
verdict: Muhammad Umar Farooq has a decent portfolio with a variety of projects showcasing his AI and automation skills, but lacks experience with key technologies like FastAPI and Django, and has limited collaboration or open-source contributions. With some focused effort to address these gaps, he can improve his chances of landing an Agentic AI Developer Intern role at his target companies.
